name: MultiSelect
description: A dropdown input for selecting multiple values from a list of options, represented visually as pills.

slots.label: Input label.
slots.pill: Custom pill rendering for selected items.

keyboardNavigation.description: Opens dropdown or moves focus to next option.
Toggles selection of the focused option.
Removes the last selected value if input is empty.

aria.role: listbox for dropdown options, option for items.
